propositions: docs/output-schemas.md cites a non-existent module path src/rebar/_engine/ticket_output.py.
The parser actually lives at src/rebar/_engine_support/output.py and is called in-process.
The doc incorrectly describes a removed bash shell-out design where bash commands shell into the machinery.
The documentation should be updated to reference the correct module path and accurate in-process invocation.
